name: copper
description: Reads Copper CRM people, companies, opportunities, leads, and tasks through the Copper REST API. In architecture v2 this quarantine bundle dispatches live reads through a Tier-2 hook that delegates to the legacy connector until the wave 6 cutover.

risk.read: external Copper API reads performed by the legacy connector via a Tier-2 hook

conformance.reason: Tier-2 hook-owned quarantine migration: internal/connectors/hooks/copper delegates Check/Read to legacy internal/connectors/copper, so conformance dynamic replay of the declarative shadow path is intentionally skipped. Static schema/docs/surface checks still run; behavior is covered by the hook unit tests and the existing legacy connector tests during the pre-cutover period.
